title: goodenia pilosa subsp. chinensis
intro: Goodenia pilosa subsp. chinensis, also known as hairy goodenia or Chinese hairy goodenia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, possessing medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia pilosa subsp. chinensis include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Goodenia pilosa subsp. chinensis is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
